case_title: SECOND ROUND, LP VS. SID A. REZIG ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND, LP AS TO DEFENDANT REZIG, SID A. , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-28-2015
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395 (B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND, LP
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 58083046) AS TO DEFENDANT REZIG, SID A. , AN INDIVIDUAL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2015 CONTINUED TO JAN-12-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE NOV-17-2015 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REZIG, SID A. , AN INDIVIDUAL $7,078.12 PRINCIPAL, $1,050.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $315.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,443.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 58366639)
